steps.title: Set up vertex form
steps.content: The object peaks at 1,600 ft when t = 10, so the vertex is (10, 1600). Write f(t) = a(t − 10)² + 1600.

steps.title: Find a using f(0) = 0
steps.content: The object launched from height 0: 0 = a(0 − 10)² + 1600 → 100a = −1600 → a = −16. So f(t) = −16(t − 10)² + 1600.
